name: Clinked
highlight_text: Category: White label client portal for businesses
description:
What Clinked does

Clinked is a white label client portal  that allows agencies to design specific interactions with clients. This leads to highly purposeful brand engagement that fosters trust among an agency’s customers.

Source: Clinked

Key features 

  • Personalized client portals that give clients easy access to files, project details, and updates.
  • Store, share, and manage files with file management tools
  • Collaboration tools to assign tasks, track progress, and communicate with team members and clients in real-time.  
  • Project management tools to track the progress of a particular project so as to beat deadlines.
  • Seamless integration with existing tools and platforms, such as Google Drive, Dropbox, and Microsoft Office. 
  • Accessibility on any device from anywhere thanks to a mobile-responsive design.

Benefits of Using Clinked

  • It has various levels of customizations to suit a wide range of businesses.
  • High level of data security and privacy 
  • It can be used anywhere and on any device.
  • It can be integrated with a variety of project management tools.
  • It is very inclusive in terms of the type of businesses it supports.

Price

  • Lite plan at $95/month
  • Standard plan at $239/month
  • Premium at $479/month

Pros

✅Mobile responsiveness 

✅Supports a wide range of industries 

✅Data privacy and security 

✅Scalable 

Cons

🚫Steep learning curve

🚫It is expensive
